atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a two-week history of intermittent toe pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports toe pain exacerbated by walking

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain became more significant last week

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain worsened during a trade show

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as throbbing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as occasionally sharp

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain when the sheets come down on it at night

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling a bone spur

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports having lost cartilage in the joint

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any stomach problems

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports enjoying spicy food

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no difficulty with riding a bike

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with hallux rigidus with secondary osteoarthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has significant cartilage loss.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a large bony spur.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The disease progression is chronic.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to administer meloxicam 15mg daily for one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to discontinue meloxicam.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to contact the clinic if he experiences significant stomach upset.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician counsels the patient on the potential need for more invasive interventions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician counsels the patient on the potential need for a joint injection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician counsels the patient on the potential need for surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends the patient continue with his regular activities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should monitor his symptoms closely.
